programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: (M) As a Playboy Bunny, Jackie Hendrickson is forbidden from dating her customers. Atlanta surgeon Dr. Warren Brown is impossible to resist, and their affair triggers a deadly spiral.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.sub-title: The Centerfold and the Serial Killer
